welcome_desc: AI agent orchestration platform built with a Rust kernel and MCP-based plugin architecture.
name_hint: This name will be visible to your AI agents during conversations.
preset_desc: Choose a server preset for your default agent.
preset_standard_desc: Balanced setup for everyday use. Web search, memory, cron, and terminal.
preset_advanced_desc: Power-user setup with image generation, screen capture, and research tools.
preset_expert_desc: Full access to all servers including vision and voice (some require manual start).
preset_minimal_desc: Lightweight setup with memory only. Add more servers later.
preset_custom_desc: Choose exactly which servers to enable.
guide_agents: Chat with AI agents, create new ones, and manage their settings.
guide_mcp: Connect and manage MCP server plugins for extended capabilities.
guide_cron: Schedule automated tasks for your agents.
guide_memory: Browse saved memories and episode archives.
guide_settings: Configure API keys, themes, language, and advanced options.
